creator: greinbold@nosheep.fr
text:
Hi,

OS: FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p9 amd64

Issue: py27-requests1-1.2.3 conflicts with py27-requests-2.17.3

Comment: I've installed security/py-certbot with his dependency py27-requests. Later I try to install www/radicale with his dependency py27-requests1.

Result: Checking integrity... done (1 conflicting)
  - py27-requests1-1.2.3 conflicts with py27-requests-2.17.3 on /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/requests/__init__.py

Regards
